parameters.query:
INSERT INTO auxiliary.sales_nf (
  chave_nf, numero_nf, serie_nf, data_emissao, 
  cnpj_cliente, razao_social_cliente, valor_total,
  valor_produtos, valor_servicos, icms, ipi, pis, cofins,
  situacao, observacoes, created_at, updated_at
) VALUES (
  $1, $2, $3, $4::date, $5, $6, $7::numeric,
  $8::numeric, $9::numeric, $10::numeric, $11::numeric, 
  $12::numeric, $13::numeric, $14, $15,
  (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::timestamp,
  (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::timestamp
)
ON CONFLICT (chave_nf)
DO UPDATE SET 
  razao_social_cliente = EXCLUDED.razao_social_cliente,
  valor_total = EXCLUDED.valor_total,
  valor_produtos = EXCLUDED.valor_produtos,
  valor_servicos = EXCLUDED.valor_servicos,
  icms = EXCLUDED.icms,
  ipi = EXCLUDED.ipi,
  pis = EXCLUDED.pis,
  cofins = EXCLUDED.cofins,
  situacao = EXCLUDED.situacao,
  observacoes = EXCLUDED.observacoes,
  updated_at = (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::timestamp
WHERE 
  sales_nf.razao_social_cliente IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.razao_social_cliente
  OR sales_nf.valor_total IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.valor_total
  OR sales_nf.valor_produtos IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.valor_produtos
  OR sales_nf.valor_servicos IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.valor_servicos
  OR sales_nf.icms IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.icms
  OR sales_nf.ipi IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.ipi
  OR sales_nf.pis IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.pis
  OR sales_nf.cofins IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.cofins
  OR sales_nf.situacao IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.situacao
  OR sales_nf.observacoes IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.observacoes
RETURNING chave_nf, numero_nf, valor_total, situacao;
